subject: A humanoid figure in formal attire pressed against an ornate gold-and-crimson mechanical wall, one hand raised defensively and one near their face, with an expression of panic
description: A close-mid shot of a humanoid figure in a dark formal coat with decorative trim, caught in a cornered, panicked pose. The figure is pressed against a richly ornamented curved wall with gold gears or clock-face motifs and deep crimson tones — Ravnican guild-hall aesthetics. One hand is raised palm-out in a 'stop' or 'wait' gesture; the other is near the figure's jaw. The expression reads as startled guilt — someone very visibly caught in the act. Lighting is dramatic and warm, with deep shadow.
foreground: Lower body of the figure, corner of a gilded frame at the edge
background: Ornate gold and crimson mechanical or clock-work wall, curved architecture
emotion: panicked guilt; the raised hand and wide expression scream 'caught in the act'
